name: hikvision-agent
description: Bridge agent: cloud serverni eshitib, mahalliy Hikvision aparatini boshqaradi

scripts.package:win: npm run build && pkg . -t node20-win-x64 --out-path dist-bin
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && pkg . -t node20-linux-x64 --out-path dist-bin
scripts.package:rpi: npm run build && pkg . -t node20-linux-arm64 --out-path dist-bin
